name: Three-Peach Pie
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Lightly butter a deep 9-inch pie pan and set aside. Roll pastry into one large circle, about 1/8-inch thick; line the prepared pan, leaving sides to overlap onto counter. Sprinkle almonds over the bottom. Toss peaches, cherries, brown sugar, cinnamon, tapioca, and lemon juice together in a bowl, then heap into pie pan. Dot with butter. Pull pastry up and over filling into a rough topping. Brush top crust lightly with milk and sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar mixture. Bake for 10 minutes, lower heat to 350°F, and bake another 35-40 minutes, until golden. Cool completely before removing from pan.
